---
title: "Hi, I’m Roxana Rodriguez!"
---

:::: {.columns .items-center}
::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/profile-picture.jpg){width="90%" style="border-radius: 50%;"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%" style="padding-left: 3rem;"}
I’m a digital marketing professional who blends creativity with data-driven strategy to turn insights into impactful results. My work focuses on analytics, SEO, and user behavior to create meaningful online experiences that drive engagement and growth
:::
:::::

## Technical Skills

<div class="skills-grid">
  <div class="skill">R Programming</div>
  <div class="skill">Tableau</div>
  <div class="skill">SEO</div>
  <div class="skill">Google Anlytics</div>
  <div class="skill">InDesign</div>
  <div class="skill">Illustrator</div>
  <div class="skill">Photoshop</div>
  <div class="skill">Premiere Pro</div>
  <div class="skill">Figma</div>
</div>

## Let's Connect

You can [email me](mailto:roxanarodriguezquevedo@gmail.com)

------------------------------------------------------------------------
